reason: Backend layer entrypoint for route/usecase/model implementation rules.
Order export and task download routes must keep DTO mapping and permission handoff in the route layer only.
Order batch iteration must use project dynamic SQL conventions and bounded DB access.
Frontend API helpers and Svelte UI changes must follow local frontend conventions.
Async export spans storage, usecase, route, realtime, and UI flows.
Excel streaming writer behavior and constraints for large XLSX exports.
